en: You're gonna get to play in Arizona where it all started, finish up your career in Arizona.
ko: 애리조나에서 시작한 만큼, 애리조나에서 경력을 마무리하게 될 거예요.

en: What do you think of that?
I love everybody. I love my wife.
Whoa, Marcy. I love my kids.
Tyson, my baby, my new baby, Katie. My older brother, who got one leg, but he's still doing it.
ko: 타이슨, 내 아기, 새 아기 케이티. 한쪽 다리가 없지만 여전히 잘 지내는 형.

en: And my younger brother, TP. You're a militant, but I ain't mad at you.
I ain't got nothing but love for you. I love my teammates.
I'm leaving somebody out here, Roy. We only have a half hour on the show.
ko: 여기서 누군가를 빼먹었네요, 로이. 방송 시간이 30분밖에 없어요.

en: I want to send some beautiful love out to my offensive line.
ko: 내 공격 라인에게 아름다운 사랑을 전하고 싶어요.

en: These are fierce, beautiful, loving inventors. Nice to see you.
